title: Ocugen Stock Forecast and Price Target by Zacks
text: Zacks investment research coverage of Ocugen Inc stock forecast. Analyst recommendations strong buy bias with average price target $9.75. Zacks rank indicates stock positioned for outperformance. Earnings estimate revisions trending positively following clinical data releases. Company expected to achieve profitability by 2028-2029. Upside catalysts: OCU400 Phase 3 data in Q4 2026 or Q1 2027. BLA submissions starting 2026. Potential FDA approvals 2026-2027 timeline. Downside risks: Clinical trial setbacks or efficacy concerns. Regulatory delays. Increased cash burn. Competitive gene therapy programs.
